feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Dick Grayson/Jason Todd on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Asking For It
entry.summary:
Author: guwonim

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,303Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: An Absolute DickJay AU When a reckless stunt in the skies costs them their target, Dick decides it’s time to enforce protocol the only way his bratty vanguard pilot understands. Jason wanted the golden boy’s harsh hands on him all along, and inside the cramped cockpit of the support mecha, Dick is more than happy to deliver.

entry.title: (Un)Buried Truth
entry.summary:
Author: Dickdaydreams

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,660Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 22

Summary: The truth is finally coming out. Of the closet. ------ “Did he inject you?” Nightwing asked, peering at Red Hood's neck. “Yeah, but I don't feel…” Jason trailed off as his body suddenly began to feel very heavy. The knife fell from his shaking hands. “Hood?” Nightwing questioned. “OK, I feel a little weird.” “It's truth serum,” Dick told him regretfully. Jason's eyes widened in panic. “Oh no.”

entry.title: "Thought You'd Like To See"
entry.summary:
Author: nursal1060

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,016Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: Bruce has come into possession of an unmarked USB from an anonymous sender. The note included with the device simply states “Red Hood and Nightwing in a compromising position - thought you’d like to see”.Bruce wasn’t prepared for what he saw on that tape - he watches all of it anyway. Grayson Gets Hooded JayDick (Bottom Dick) Week: Face Fucking/Leaked Sex Tape/ “Open Up For Me, Goldie.”

entry.title: To Love One Another Like the Sun and Moon
entry.summary:
Author: bluewingsofthenight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,648Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: “I would have never left you.”To this, Dick pulls back, a brief flash of pain mars his features, before settling to something softer.“I know you would never. You could never.”Smiling softly, he brings a hand to Jason’s cheek.“You came back.”Or: Jason may have left the palace, no longer a Knight, but he will always find his way back to Dick, to his Prince.For Day 4: Red Strings of Fate AU - Forbidden Love

entry.title: I can't help falling in love with you
entry.summary:
Author: borkbork52

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,518Chapters: 8/15Kudos: 265

Summary: Tim returns home after a Bad Time™ with Bernard thinking he's worthless only to discover just how much his family loves him (and then some) instead. A deep dive into consensual polycule Batfamily where the boys fall in love, seduce their dad, and make Gotham look good doing it.

entry.title: Freefall
entry.summary:
Author: onArete

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 159,553Chapters: 27/33Kudos: 544

Summary: Being Robin feels like flying: steady, wind-whistle certainty that what he and Batman are doing is right. Even with his hands bloody, Dick doesn’t waver. He knows they’re doing good: permanently removing the murderers and criminals from Gotham. Of course, nobody can fly forever.

entry.title: The Little Bird Knight
entry.summary:
Author: hekou

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,449Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: Bruce (33, Batman – this remains constant even if the world ends, yes)Damian (20, Batboy – now independent) > Tim (14, Red Falcon – current Batman's assistant) > Jason (10, Batman's assistant candidate – self-proclaimed) > Dick (6)—Jason used to hate Dick,but now, he loves his brother.

entry.title: Decadent Elegy on the Rusted Edge
entry.summary:
Author: Lucerne3149D

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,920Chapters: 2/10Kudos: 33

Summary: Dick Grayson once believed that hard work alone could change his fate. By day, he is a top student in the criminal justice program at community college; by night, he wipes down the bar at a rundown tavern on the edge of the city just to survive. Heavy debt is slowly grinding away his pride.Until Jason Todd appears.The cold, arrogant, and wildly wealthy heir uses two thousand dollars to buy one night with him. That night, money and desire collide in raw, naked heat.From cold transactions to fierce confrontations, then to gradually uncontrollable possession and redemption — the two become entangled again and again on the edge.They both thought they could control the game, but they never expected that a decadent elegy of class, desire, and downfall had already begun to play.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: you were always a winner (the one i knew best)
entry.summary:
Author: lazarustears (ryyss)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,729Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: "Here to finish me off?" Jason taunted, his voice gravelly and hoarse, not quite what it should be yet. "Is this where you're holed up in?" Jason had been expecting Bruce again. He had almost expected Batman to crash into his dingy, shitty safe house, forcing his hand to fight lest he be placed into a place like Arkham, as though criminals didn't regularly break out anyway, oh, God forbid, whatever could he possibly do, he's so scared— He was not, on the other hand, expecting Nightwing. "Ha, you're not dead after all," Jason said.or: nightwing pays a visit to red hood. —for day 4 of ggh jdweek 2026:face fucking & "open up for me, goldie."

entry.title: Scary Monsters (And Super Creeps)
entry.summary:
Author: mermaidautopsy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,421Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 6

Summary: 'I'm not sure which I should preform first; an exorcism, or pest removal' John grumbled to no one but himself, flicking his lighter back to life and kissing it to the end of his last, crumpled cigarette. Chas, characterisically unimpressed with the warlock's lax attitude towards the case, grumbled something no doubt vulgarly worded to himself out of John's earshot in return. A third voice; calm, collected, and to John's ears, far too distinctly Gothamite for his liking, entered the conversation without waiting to ask either of the gentlemen for permission. 'If you let me take out the vermin, there won't be any need for your cheap magic tricks' the Red Hood spoke through his visor, exiting the shadows that pervaded the entrenched canal walkway, stalking towards the two men where they stood, hands shoved in their pockets, bickering under a half-dead streetlamp at the water's edge. 'Well our kid, Chas and I, we can't take you up on that most generous offer of yours. See, we've already come so far out here as to freeze our arses off, might as well let us finish the job' John shot back, puffing up smoke and steam alike as he offered the young vigilante a pointed glare 'In summery; fuck off'.

entry.summary:
Author: 002yb

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,950Chapters: 12/14Kudos: 585

Summary: Life has a funny way of screwing people and Jason has always looked best fucked over. It’s why it isn’t all that surprising that he wakes up from a blackout stupor to the staggering realization that he’s slept with his not-quite-brother and crush-for-forever. He expects it to be a big deal. It's not.

entry.title: blood is thicker than water
entry.summary:
Author: nux_myristica

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,314Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 43

Summary: Jason had no problem covering for Dick on this one. It happens. Death happens. And this one was most certainly an accident, and even if it wasn’t, the fucker deserved to die. But then it happens again. And again. And again. And it’s not so easy to cover Dick’s bloodied hands, though Dick sure as hell convinces Jason to try.
